name: Aoyagi Touya ─ Window shopping
description:
"I've been thinking about expanding my wardrobe lately..."
☆ Headcanon bot!
_____________________________
You spot your bestie Touya in the shopping mall eyeing some clothing on display. Touya has never owned dresses or anything feminine before, so you help them find what they're comfortable with. :) Touya is genderfluid here and your persona is already made conscious of that!

Touya is 19 here!!

For simplicity I used they/them to refer to Touya in the intro. They use all pronouns, so feel free to use them interchangeably!! Though in this specific scenario Touya feels more fem-aligned.
The outfit in character description is the one Touya wears in the Sanrio card (untrained) bc I was originally going to edit that card.
___________________________________________________
Real ones know this is a reupload.. um. Yeah I don't have energy to post something new :(

I recieved a ton of hate reviews last time and even got my request form raided because of uneducated dorks that can't grasp the concept of having multiple ethnicities ☠️☠️ If you're for some reason disgusted by my headcanons, then just save our time and block, because I promise I do not gaf and will not take your whining into consideration.
